name: Champagne Lace Elevator Mirror Selfie
description: Elegant woman in champagne lace fitted dress taking mirror selfie in stainless-steel elevator, red handbag, red lipstick, older Android phone aesthetic
input_prompt: woman elevator mirror selfie champagne lace dress red handbag lipstick stainless steel

subject.description: elegant adult woman taking full-body mirror selfie in stainless-steel elevator, poised and confident with slight side profile

hair.style: shoulder-length loose waves with volume, side-parted
hair.details: effect: soft sheen, slightly tousled but styled

face.expression: focused and composed, cool confident slightly aloof
face.makeup: clean base, defined brows, bold red lipstick
face.details: eyes: looking toward phone screen in mirror, calm self-assured; mouth: closed, neutral with confident edge

body.details: waist: defined; legs: long-looking due to heels and pose

clothing.type: lace fitted sleeveless top with deep V neckline
clothing.details: lace overlay with delicate floral pattern, semi-sheer texture at neckline

clothing.type: matching fitted lace skirt to below knee (or continuous dress silhouette)
clothing.details: lace pattern continues, body-hugging cut, slight wrinkles from movement; effect: elegant polished evening look

accessories: early-generation Android smartphone with dark patterned case
deep red glossy handbag held down at side

pose_action.position: standing full-body in front of elevator mirror
pose_action.camera_relation: full-body vertical portrait, subject centered slightly right
pose_action.posture: weight on one leg, other leg slightly forward, hips subtly angled
pose_action.action: action: phone raised near face for mirror selfie, head turned slightly to side

background: tall black elevator control panel with many buttons on left
small instruction/safety sign on right wall
strong mirror reflections and metallic seams
environment.atmosphere: clean, modern, slightly glossy and reflective

camera_technical.style: social media candid realism, older phone aesthetic
camera_technical.angle: eye-level mirror reflection with slight wide-angle distortion
camera_technical.quality: texture: slight noise, mild compression, bit of oversharpening typical of older phone cameras, imperfections: older Android camera characteristics
camera_technical.depth_of_field: deep focus, most of scene sharp

mirror_rules.text_handling: all readable text and symbols appear correct and forward (not reversed)
mirror_rules.reflection_integrity: show phone and reflection naturally, no mirrored artifacts
mirror_rules.signage: ignore real-world mirror inversion physics, keep signage and UI text oriented normally

the_vibe.authenticity: unedited social photo feeling with older-phone imperfections
the_vibe.story: quick outfit check and confident snapshot on the way out

realism_anchors: older Android camera noise and oversharpening

flattened_prompt: older Android phone elevator mirror selfie 3:4, elegant woman late 20s to mid 30s light warm skin, dark brown shoulder-length loose waves side-parted soft sheen, focused composed expression bold red lipstick defined brows, slim feminine curves defined waist, champagne ivory lace fitted dress deep V neckline delicate floral pattern semi-sheer body-hugging slight wrinkles, nude pointed-toe high heels, gold earrings bangle bracelet, early Android smartphone dark patterned case, deep red glossy handbag at side, standing full-body weight on one leg hips angled phone raised near face head turned slightly, stainless-steel elevator interior brushed silver walls tall black button panel on left safety sign right mirror reflections metallic seams, even overhead elevator lighting warm-neutral reflections on metal, slight noise mild compression oversharpening older phone aesthetic deep focus, text appears correct not reversed, cool confident ready-to-go-out mood

color_palette.accent: deep red handbag, bold red lipstick, gold jewelry

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: An elegant woman in her late 20s to mid 30s takes a full-body mirror selfie in a stainless-steel elevator. She has light to light-medium skin with warm undertones and smooth texture with realistic pores. Her dark brown to black hair falls in shoulder-length loose waves, side-parted with soft sheen, slightly tousled but styled. Her expression is focused and composed with cool confidence, eyes looking toward the phone screen in the mirror, mouth closed with a confident edge. She wears clean base makeup with defined brows and bold red lipstick. She has a slim frame with feminine curves and defined waist. She wears a champagne ivory lace fitted dress with a deep V neckline, delicate floral lace pattern, semi-sheer texture, body-hugging cut with slight wrinkles from movement. Nude pointed-toe high heels, gold earrings, gold bangle bracelet, and a light-colored bangle on the other wrist. She holds an early-generation Android smartphone with a dark patterned case in one hand and a deep red glossy handbag at her side. Her weight is on one leg with the other slightly forward, hips subtly angled, phone raised near face, head turned slightly to side. The elevator interior has brushed silver metal walls, a tall black control panel with many buttons on the left, and a small safety sign on the right. Even overhead elevator lighting creates warm-neutral tones with pronounced reflections on the metal. Slight noise, mild compression, and oversharpening give an older phone aesthetic with deep focus. All text appears correct and not reversed. No watermark. No artificial smoothing. Realistic texture.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Elegant woman late 20s taking full-body mirror selfie in stainless-steel elevator, dark wavy shoulder-length hair, bold red lipstick and defined brows, slim feminine figure in champagne ivory lace fitted dress with V neckline and floral pattern, nude heels gold jewelry, holding deep red glossy handbag and older Android phone, brushed silver elevator walls with black button panel, overhead lighting with metal reflections, slight noise and oversharpening typical of older smartphone cameras, cool confident ready-to-go-out mood, not anime or cartoon-like
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: Elegant woman in her late 20s to mid 30s taking full-body mirror selfie in stainless-steel elevator. Dark brown shoulder-length wavy hair, side-parted with soft sheen. Light skin with warm undertones, focused composed expression, bold red lipstick, defined brows. Slim feminine curves in champagne ivory lace fitted dress with deep V neckline, delicate floral pattern, semi-sheer texture, slight movement wrinkles. Nude pointed-toe heels, gold earrings and bangle bracelet. Holding early Android smartphone with dark case and deep red glossy handbag. Weight on one leg, hips angled, phone near face, head slightly turned. Brushed silver elevator walls, tall black button panel, safety sign. Overhead lighting with metal reflections. Older phone camera aesthetic with slight noise and oversharpening.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the champagne lace dress to a navy blue solid dress while keeping the red lipstick and red handbag the same. Preserve the elevator setting with stainless steel walls and the older phone camera aesthetic.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed lace dress (floral pattern, semi-sheer), specific elevator elements (button panel, safety sign), device details
2_realism_anchors: 'stainless steel reflections', 'older Android noise and oversharpening', 'lace fabric texture', 'red handbag gloss'
4_negative_hygiene: prevents reversed text, watermarks, cinematic lighting, smooth skin
5_spatial_consistency: clear full-body pose with weight shift and head turn
6_lighting_storytelling: 'overhead elevator lighting' = urban confident ready-to-go mood
7_mirror_rules: explicit text orientation and reflection integrity instructions
